nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Negative Prompt)
widgets_values: 色调艳丽，过曝，静态，细节模糊不清，字幕，风格，作品，画作，画面，静止，整体发灰，最差质量，低质量，JPEG压缩残留，丑陋的，残缺的，多余的手指，画得不好的手部，画得不好的脸部，畸形的，毁容的，形态畸形的肢体，手指融合，静止不动的画面，杂乱的背景，三条腿，背景人很多，倒着走

Download and save the models in the respective paths. Download the exact same filenames. (Even we run wan 2.2 wan_2.1_vae is correct).

path:
upscale_models:
https://huggingface.co/ai-forever/Real-ESRGAN/tree/main

clip:
https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Wan_2.1_ComfyUI_repackaged/tree/main/split_files/text_encoders

vae:
https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Wan_2.1_ComfyUI_repackaged/tree/main/split_files/vae

nodes.title: Upscale, fps Multiplier, Output
widgets_values:
2x upscale, 4x fps multiplier

"final video" node: saves the mp4 file without metadata/workflow. Otherwise set "save_metadata" to true.

If you want to expand your video, just use the last frame image as the start image in a new i2v generation.

Should work with defaults.

I you run in "out of memory" issues try to increase the "blocks_to_swap" value.

1. set "clip lenght": 5s are optimal, you can try higher values (7s seems works well too)
2. set "Image Rezise": this will rezise your input image automatically by the longer side 
   without cropping. Use values like 480, 520, 640 for faster generations. 720 is optimal for 
   high quality outputs.
3. select Image or Batch input (please take care that only one option is active).
   Image: upload a single start image.
   Batch: will randomly grab an image from your local batch folder for each generation.
   Specify your folder under "path".

Download the LightX2V Lora into your Lora folder:

https://huggingface.co/lightx2v/Wan2.1-I2V-14B-480P-StepDistill-CfgDistill-Lightx2v/tree/main/loras

and allways activate it in High Pass and Low Pass.
You can use it for I2V and T2V generation.
Cause the Lora is Wan 2.1 based you have to use higher wights:

High Pass: 3.0
Low Pass: 1.5 seems to work well.

You can try to use similar wights for any other Wan 2.1 Loras but maybe you have to try and test it.

widgets_values.lora: 90 video\wan Bouncing Boobs i2v 14b v1 (her breasts are bouncing).safetensors
90 video\wan Bouncing Boobs i2v 14b v1 (her breasts are bouncing).safetensors

widgets_values:
1. set "clip lenght": 5s are optimal, you can try higher values (7s seems works well too).
2. Empty Latent: set the start resolution of your video (output video will upscaled 2x).
   480x720 for example will generate high quality outputs in reasonable time. Lower the values for faster 
   generations.

nodes.title: First Preparation / Model downloads
widgets_values:
You will find all download sources and paths to save in the corresponding notes.

1. download all "Part A - General Models"
2. download the "Part B - Lora Models"
3. download all "Part C - GGUF Models"

nodes.title: Attention
widgets_values:
Please use this workflow with a working Triton + Sage Attention installation only!
Otherwise use my workflow v1.1

"Select Prompt": select the text field you like to work with.

The 4 fields are just for convinience, quick testing or saving different prompts:
you can generate with the active field and create some new promts in the other fields at the same time for example.

nodes.title: Part C - GGUF Models download
widgets_values:
Download the required 14B_Q4_K_M.gguf models and save them in your unet path (download the exact same filnames as you see in the "Unet Loaders"):

Image 2 Video:
https://huggingface.co/bullerwins/Wan2.2-I2V-A14B-GGUF/tree/main

Text 2 Video:
https://huggingface.co/bullerwins/Wan2.2-T2V-A14B-GGUF/tree/main

1. choose between "Image 2 Video and Text 2 Video"
2. "Generation Steps": set it between 4 - 8 (6 steps are optimal even for high quality outputs)

Enable/Disable Triton + Sage Attention

(no need to change anything in the nodes)

Enable/Disable Triton + Sage Attention

(no need to change anything in the nodes)

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: a breathtaking video of a super cute little cat cuddling in a basket

nodes.title: Quick Start
widgets_values:
0. add/activate your optional Loras in "Part B - Lora Models" 
1. "01 Prompt": select and write a prompt
2. "02 Generation Settings": choose between "Image2Video/Text2Video" and set the
   "Generation Settings"
3. "03 Text 2 Video" or "03 Image 2 Video": set the required inputs 
4. "SA_I2V" or "SA_T2V": enable/disable the use of Triton + Sage Attention
4. press Run

Note:
By default, all settings are set to optimal values.
For quick testing you may lower the settings for:
steps, clip lenght and video resolution.

For testing/understanding/changing the workflow:
Klick "Toggle Link Visibility" to see the links.
Move nodes to see all covered nodes.
All the "hidden" "Any Switches" are for easy switching between the different options only. If you like to understand the basics just remove these switches and simplyfy the workflow to your own likeness.

nodes.title: Introduction
widgets_values:
This workflow is optimized for 12 GB VRAM gpu`s with a working Triton + Sagge Attention installation. Installation of Triton and Sage Attention is required!
It runs perfect with a RTX 3060 12 GB VRAM gpu and 32 GB RAM.
A 10 Second video generation takes about 23 minutes instead of more than 30 minutes (see below).

Easy installation/model downloads:
All nessecary download sources are specified.

LightX2V Lora:
fast (4 to 8 step) generation with high quality outputs. 

BlockSwap:
To avoid "out of memory" errors.
Significantly reduces VRAM usage without noticeably affecting speed. It is possible to run some other tasks on the same machine while genarating.

Upscaling and Framerate multiply: 
2x fast upscale
4x fast framerate multiply

generates very smooth and high quality video ouputs up to 1440x960 60fps.

Simple Prompt selector:
For convenience you have 4 single text fields to write your prompts. You simply can select the prompt you actually like to work with. 

As a rough guide value for RTX 3060 gpu:
generating a 10 second high quality 720x480 "image 2 video" with 6 steps and 16 fps
(output video = 1440x960, 60fps) will take:

around 23 minutes with Sage Attantion active
around 34 minutes with Sage Attention off
